content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "為什麼學中文",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，請問你從哪裡來？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ cóng nǎlǐ lái?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 cong2 na3li3 lai2?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, may I ask where you are from?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 어디에서 오셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我從美國來。我的故鄉在紐約。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ cóng Měiguó lái. Wǒ de gùxiāng zài Niǔyuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 cong2 Mei3guo2 lai2. Wo3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 Niu3yue1.",
          "translation_en": "I'm from the United States. My hometown is New York.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 미국에서 왔어요. 제 고향은 뉴욕이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你為什麼想學中文？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ wèishénme xiǎng xué Zhōngwén?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 wei4shen2me xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2?",
          "translation_en": "Why do you want to learn Chinese?",
          "translation_ko": "왜 중국어를 배우고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "因為我喜歡台灣的文化，也覺得中文很有意思。",
          "pinyin": "Yīnwèi wǒ xǐhuān Táiwān de wénhuà, yě juéde Zhōngwén hěn yǒuyìsi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yin1wei4 wo3 xi3huan1 Tai2wan1 de wen2hua4, ye3 jue2de Zhong1wen2 hen3 you3yi4si.",
          "translation_en": "Because I like Taiwanese culture, and I also think Chinese is very interesting.",
          "translation_ko": "대만 문화가 좋고, 중국어도 아주 재미있다고 생각해서요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你學中文多久了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xué Zhōngwén duōjiǔ le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xue2 Zhong1wen2 duo1jiu3 le?",
          "translation_en": "How long have you been learning Chinese?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어를 배운 지 얼마나 되었나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我已經學了半年。希望將來可以說得很流利。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yǐjīng xué le bàn nián. Xīwàng jiānglái kěyǐ shuō de hěn liúlì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yi3jing1 xue2 le ban4 nian2. Xi1wang4 jiang1lai2 ke3yi3 shuo1 de hen3 liu2li4.",
          "translation_en": "I've been learning for half a year. I hope to speak fluently in the future.",
          "translation_ko": "반 년째 배우고 있어요. 앞으로 유창하게 말할 수 있으면 좋겠어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "加油！你已經進步很多了。",
          "pinyin": "Jiāyóu! Nǐ yǐjīng jìnbù hěn duō le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jia1you2! Ni3 yi3jing1 jin4bu4 hen3 duo1 le.",
          "translation_en": "Keep it up! You've already improved a lot.",
          "translation_ko": "힘내세요! 벌써 많이 발전했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "謝謝！我會繼續努力的。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie! Wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie! Wo3 hui4 ji4xu4 nu3li4 de.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you! I will keep working hard.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다! 계속 노력할게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the speaker from?",
          "question_ko": "화자는 어디에서 왔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Taiwan", "America", "Japan"],
          "options_ko": ["대만", "미국", "일본"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Introduce yourself: where you are from, why you are learning Chinese, and how long you have been learning."
    },
    {
      "title": "在台灣多久了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你來台灣多久了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ lái Táiwān duōjiǔ le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 lai2 Tai2wan1 duo1jiu3 le?",
          "translation_en": "How long have you been in Taiwan?",
          "translation_ko": "대만에 온 지 얼마나 되었나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我來台灣已經兩年了。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ lái Táiwān yǐjīng liǎng nián le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 lai2 Tai2wan1 yi3jing1 liang3 nian2 le.",
          "translation_en": "I've been in Taiwan for two years.",
          "translation_ko": "대만에 온 지 2년 되었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你住在哪個城市？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zhù zài nǎge chéngshì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zhu4 zai4 na3ge cheng2shi4?",
          "translation_en": "Which city do you live in?",
          "translation_ko": "어느 도시에 살고 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我住在台北。台北是一個很熱鬧的城市。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zhù zài Táiběi. Táiběi shì yīge hěn rènào de chéngshì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zhu4 zai4 Tai2bei3. Tai2bei3 shi4 yi1ge hen3 re4nao4 de cheng2shi4.",
          "translation_en": "I live in Taipei. Taipei is a very lively city.",
          "translation_ko": "타이베이에 살아요. 타이베이는 아주 번화한 도시예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你現在在做什麼工作？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiànzài zài zuò shénme gōngzuò?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xian4zai4 zai4 zuo4 shen2me gong1zuo4?",
          "translation_en": "What work are you doing now?",
          "translation_ko": "지금 무슨 일을 하고 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我是一個學生，也在學中文。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ shì yīge xuéshēng, yě zài xué Zhōngwén.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 shi4 yi1ge xue2sheng1, ye3 zai4 xue2 Zhong1wen2.",
          "translation_en": "I am a student, and I'm also learning Chinese.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 학생이고, 중국어도 배우고 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你的目標是什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ de mùbiāo shì shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 de mu4biao1 shi4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What is your goal?",
          "translation_ko": "목표가 무엇인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我希望將來可以通過中文考試。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xīwàng jiānglái kěyǐ tōngguò Zhōngwén kǎoshì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xi1wang4 jiang1lai2 ke3yi3 tong1guo4 Zhong1wen2 kao3shi4.",
          "translation_en": "I hope to pass the Chinese exam in the future.",
          "translation_ko": "앞으로 중국어 시험에 합격할 수 있으면 좋겠어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How long has the speaker been in Taiwan?",
          "question_ko": "화자는 대만에 온 지 얼마나 되었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["One year", "Two years", "Three years"],
          "options_ko": ["1년", "2년", "3년"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell about your background: where you live, what you do, and your goals."
    },
    {
      "title": "自我介紹",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，請你介紹一下自己。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng nǐ jièshào yīxià zìjǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 ni3 jie4shao4 yi1xia4 zi4ji3.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, please introduce yourself.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 자기소개를 해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的。我叫王小明，從日本來。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de. Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, cóng Rìběn lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de. Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, cong2 Ri4ben3 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay. My name is Wang Xiaoming, and I'm from Japan.",
          "translation_ko": "네. 제 이름은 왕샤오밍이고, 일본에서 왔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你的故鄉在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ de gùxiāng zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Where is your hometown?",
          "translation_ko": "고향이 어디인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我的故鄉在東京。我在那裡出生長大。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ de gùxiāng zài Dōngjīng. Wǒ zài nàlǐ chūshēng zhǎngdà.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 de gu4xiang1 zai4 Dong1jing1. Wo3 zai4 na4li3 chu1sheng1 zhang3da4.",
          "translation_en": "My hometown is Tokyo. I was born and grew up there.",
          "translation_ko": "제 고향은 도쿄예요. 거기서 태어나서 자랐어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你為什麼來台灣？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ wèishénme lái Táiwān?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 wei4shen2me lai2 Tai2wan1?",
          "translation_en": "Why did you come to Taiwan?",
          "translation_ko": "왜 대만에 오셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我來台灣留學，想學中文和了解台灣文化。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ lái Táiwān liúxué, xiǎng xué Zhōngwén hé liǎojiě Táiwān wénhuà.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 lai2 Tai2wan1 liu2xue2, xiang3 xue2 Zhong1wen2 he2 liao3jie3 Tai2wan1 wen2hua4.",
          "translation_en": "I came to Taiwan to study abroad, to learn Chinese and understand Taiwanese culture.",
          "translation_ko": "유학 왔어요. 중국어를 배우고 대만 문화를 이해하고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你現在是學生嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiànzài shì xuéshēng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xian4zai4 shi4 xue2sheng1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Are you a student now?",
          "translation_ko": "지금 학생인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我現在是學生，也在打工。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ xiànzài shì xuéshēng, yě zài dǎgōng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 xian4zai4 shi4 xue2sheng1, ye3 zai4 da3gong1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I'm a student now, and I also work part-time.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 지금 학생이고 아르바이트도 하고 있어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the speaker come to Taiwan?",
          "question_ko": "화자는 왜 대만에 왔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["To work", "To travel", "To study"],
          "options_ko": ["일하려고", "여행하려고", "공부하려고"],
          "correct_index": 2
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on natural flow and tone.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Introduce yourself: your name, hometown, why you are in Taiwan, and what you do."
    }
  ]
}
